snapshot.description: Make each card in the flight offers list expandable with smooth animations, displaying full timelines (departure/arrival airports, times, travel duration), and a rich features block including legroom, carbon emissions, and contrail warming potential.
snapshot.title: Implement expandable premium accordion details for flight offers
